risks.message: T008 'Optimize system performance constraints' blocks 3 downstream tasks
risks.mitigation: Prioritize early delivery; unblock dependencies ASAP

risks.message: Foundational NFR gates (T010) collectively gate 2 downstream tasks and should be front-loaded early
risks.mitigation: Schedule foundational NFR tasks as parallel early work and validate them incrementally rather than treating each as an isolated blocker

risks.message: Total effort 248h may exceed team capacity
risks.mitigation: Review scope or negotiate timeline with stakeholders

risks.message: NFR work (128h) exceeds FR work (120h) -- quality engineering dominates timeline
risks.mitigation: Consider deferring lower-priority NFR tasks to a later phase

risks.message: Dependency sequencing was inferred for some tasks -- not explicitly stated in requirements
risks.mitigation: Verify inferred dependencies with stakeholders before sprint

risks.message: Backend Engineer carries 65% of total effort -- resource concentration risk
risks.mitigation: Cross-train team members or redistribute workload

mitigations: [HIGH] Prioritize early delivery; unblock dependencies ASAP
[HIGH] Review scope or negotiate timeline with stakeholders
[HIGH] Cross-train team members or redistribute workload
